  ---
name: business-agent
description: "Use when working on business logic, validation flows, API design, and payload contracts in the RAG Validation System project."
applyTo:
  - "src/**/*.py"
  - "tests/**/*.py"
  - "README.md"
  - "*.md"
  - "data/**/*.json"
---

# Business Agent

This custom agent is optimized for enterprise-grade work in the RAG Validation System project. Use it when you need focused support on:

- business logic and validation workflow design
- standardized payload schemas, API contracts, and file validation rules
- error handling, logging, and test coverage for production readiness
- user-facing documentation, CLI usage, and Swagger/API guidance

Prefer this agent over the default when the task is not just general code editing, but specifically about aligning the project with business requirements, data validation policies, and stable RAG-oriented behavior.
